methodology: ESPN API spread/total open→close line movement only. Calibration: 50% draws in last 14 games, hot-favorite-draw pattern. No score correction.

retrospective.note: predictions/ directory empty, no prior predictions to grade. Observed past 24h: 3 home wins, 1 draw, 0 away wins. Hot-favorite-draw trend (6 prior) BROKEN — Portugal 1-1 DR Congo is NOT a hot-favorite draw (Portugal was heavy favorite but still drew; however the streak of expected-wins-not-happening pauses). England 4-2 Croatia shows strong team with line movement can win.
retrospective.calibration: Hold: hot-favorite-draw caution remains valid (Portugal still drew). Confirmed: strong spread+total dual signal still reliable for big favorites (CAN -360 with over support = bettable).

predictions.line_movement_summary: CZE spread -110→-125 (mild home support); RSA spread -125→+100 (away gaining value); under still strong -165→-135. Mixed signals + hot-favorite-draw pattern → lean draw.

MASSIVE shift: SUI spread moved -1.5→-0.5 AND odds from +135→-185. Market now treats SUI as dominant 0.5-goal favorite. Total flat (no signal). Spread-only signal caps at ⭐⭐⭐ (need both signals for ⭐⭐⭐⭐).

DUAL STRONG SIGNAL: spread CAN -1.5 with odds +125→-125 (massive home support) + total over odds +110→-145 (massive over support). Both signals align. CAN -360 ML confirms dominance. Only ⭐⭐⭐⭐ pick in this batch.
MEX spread -0.5 WEAKENING (-135→-105); KOR spread gaining (+100→-125). Under strong -150→-170. Hot-favorite-draw pattern + MEX weakening → lean draw 1-1.

summary: 1 ⭐⭐⭐⭐ pick (CAN) + 1 ⭐⭐⭐ (SUI) + 2 ⭐⭐ (CZE/RSA, MEX/KOR). Total: 4 matches within 24h BJT window.
tournament_context: Tournament trends reference: tournament-trends.md notes consecutive hot-favorite draws through 06-16. Last 24h broke streak: Portugal drew (still hot-fav draw), but England 4-2 Croatia and Austria 3-1 Jordan are home wins. Pattern: home teams winning 3/4 in last 24h.
